examples.title: Algorithm: Merkle Patricia Trie
examples.description: Pseudocode for a Merkle Patricia Trie implementation
examples.code:
ALGORITHM MPT
INPUT: key, value
OUTPUT: updated trie

BEGIN
 IF key is empty THEN
 RETURN new leaf node with value
 END IF
 current node = root
 FOR EACH character c IN key DO
 IF c is not in current node THEN
 create new child node
 current node.children[c] = new child node
 END IF
 current node = current node.children[c]
 END FOR
 current node.value = value
 RETURN root
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to insert a key-value pair into a Merkle Patricia Trie.
